text.headline: Sean Xiang - Founder Chronicle
text.text: A simple MVP timeline of study, research, company building, partnerships, and AI-era milestones.

text.headline: Open Virtualization Alliance resource
text.text: An external ecosystem resource captures Bloombase in secure virtualization discourse before the stronger 2013 first-party release trail begins.

text.headline: OpenStack Community
text.text: Bloombase joins OpenStack, with Sean Xiang publicly framed as co-founder and CEO and cloud-security advocate.

text.headline: EMC Technology Partner Program
text.text: Bloombase announces EMC interoperability across VNX, Atmos, and NetWorker as enterprise validation starts to stack up.

text.headline: VMware Technology Alliance
text.text: Bloombase joins VMware's TAP program, making virtualization and cloud trust part of the public company narrative.

text.headline: Dell Technology Partner Certification
text.text: Bloombase achieves Dell Technology Partner certification for next-generation data-at-rest encryption security.

text.headline: Bloombase adds Gregory W. Slayton to its advisory board
text.text: A direct company release shows the founder chapter maturing into an international-growth and strategic-guidance story, not just a run of product interoperability milestones.

text.headline: Hitachi Alliance
text.text: Bloombase joins Hitachi Data Systems' Technology Alliance Program.

text.headline: HP ESKM Interoperability
text.text: StoreSafe certified interoperable with HP Enterprise Secure Key Manager.

text.headline: Thales ASAP Alliance
text.text: Bloombase joins Thales ASAP alliance.

text.headline: HPE Helion Ready / ArcSight
text.text: Cloud and security certification milestone.

text.headline: Ultra Electronics AEP Keyper HSM interoperability
text.text: Bloombase expands the trust-layer story with a direct HSM interoperability release focused on hardened key storage and large-scale enterprise security.

text.headline: IBM Validation
text.text: StoreSafe receives IBM Ready for Security Intelligence validation.

text.headline: ATTO interoperability certification
text.text: Bloombase certifies StoreSafe with ATTO storage-networking hardware, extending the validation arc into SAN, NAS, and high-speed connectivity infrastructure.

text.headline: Huawei OceanStor V3 interoperability certification
text.text: Bloombase certifies StoreSafe with Huawei OceanStor V3, extending the validation trail into unified storage infrastructure and telecom / MSP deployment contexts.

text.headline: VMware Cloud on AWS
text.text: StoreSafe for VMware Cloud on AWS announced.

text.headline: Canada Expansion Story
text.text: Launch Academy / Maple public expansion chapter.

text.headline: Azure Marketplace
text.text: Bloombase StoreSafe available in Microsoft Azure Marketplace.

text.headline: Marvell LiquidSecurity HSM partnership
text.text: A partner-hosted Marvell release extends the 2019 enterprise trust layer into network HSM infrastructure between the Azure and nCipher milestones.

text.headline: nCipher Collaboration
text.text: Cloud data-at-rest protection collaboration.

text.headline: Futurex Collaboration
text.text: Security partnership milestone.

text.headline: NVIDIA DPU / GPU Era
text.text: Rebuilding Bloombase data-at-rest security with NVIDIA DPUs and GPUs.

text.headline: Conference / Ecosystem Visibility
text.text: RSA, GTC, MWC, CYBERSEC and broader public ecosystem presence.

text.headline: Utimaco Alliance
text.text: Alliance focused on AI-era data security solutions.

text.headline: Entering USTC
text.text: Entered the University of Science and Technology of China in 1980, majoring in Physics.

text.headline: Born in Shanxi
text.text: Born in Jincheng, Shanxi, marking the beginning of the journey.

text.headline: Research Associate, HKUST
text.text: Research Associate at Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, 1996–1997, following the CUHK doctorate.

text.headline: Scientist, Beckman Laser Institute, UC Irvine
text.text: Scientist at the Beckman Laser Institute & Medical Clinic, UC Irvine, Aug 1997 – Dec 1999.

text.headline: CUHK PhD
text.text: Advanced training in Electrical and Electronic Engineering at The Chinese University of Hong Kong.

text.headline: Bloombase co-founded
text.text: Sean Xiang co-founds Bloombase in January 2012 and begins his tenure as CEO, building toward the 2013 public release trail.

text.headline: Founding Dean, School of AI — Shenzhen Technology University
text.text: Distinguished Professor and Founding Dean of the School of Artificial Intelligence at Shenzhen Technology University, January 2018 – June 2021.

text.headline: Chair Professor & Executive President — X-Institute of Shenzhen
text.text: Chair Professor, Co-founder, and Executive President at the X-Institute of Shenzhen, June 2021 – December 2023.
